text:
This variable is the total count of Medicaid inpatient (IP), long-term care (LT), pharmacy (RX) and other 
services (OT) (header) claims for the beneficiary for each month, after removing the managed care 
capitated payment claims from the OT file. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Claims files (derived) 

VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: CCW filtered the OT claims header records to distinguish between capitated payments and payments 
for services. Capitated payment claims are header claims where
